description_long: This is a modern, two-seater sofa with a minimalist design, featuring a light gray fabric upholstery and a wooden frame. The sofa has two large seat cushions and two back cushions, complemented by two loose side pillows for added comfort. The armrests and back are constructed from wood panels with a natural finish, giving the piece a clean, geometric silhouette. The legs are slender and made of wood, connected by a horizontal support bar for stability. The overall look is contemporary, with a focus on straight lines and subtle contrasts between the soft fabric and the hard wood. This sofa would fit well in urban parks, public waiting areas, or stylish outdoor lounges.
description: A modern, light gray fabric sofa with a wooden frame, two seat cushions, and two back cushions, accented by loose side pillows. The design is minimalist with straight lines and a natural wood finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full seating area, two seat cushions, two back cushions, and two loose side pillows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wooden armrest panel and the depth of the seat and cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous wooden back panel and the horizontal support bar beneath.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the armrest and cushion arrangement seen in view 1.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large seat cushions and two back cushions, all uniform in size, with two loose side pillows placed at each end; cushions appear unattached and evenly arranged.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, flat wooden armrests at seat height, forming a continuous panel with the backrest, with no visible padding or decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four slender, exposed wooden legs positioned at the corners, connected by a horizontal support bar; legs have a simple, straight profile with a natural wood finish.
attribute_backrest_type: High, straight, continuous backrest formed by a wooden panel with two large, unattached back cushions for comfort.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid light gray fabric with a smooth, matte texture and no visible decorative stitching or pattern.
